message:
ci: add GitHub Actions matrix

Adds linux/windows integration tests for Chrome sqlite decryption.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+
+jobs:
+  test:
+    name: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: 22
+          cache: pnpm
+
+      - name: Enable Corepack
+        run: corepack enable
+
+      - name: Install
+        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Lint
+        run: pnpm lint
+
+      - name: Test
+        run: pnpm test
+
+      - name: Build
+        run: pnpm build
+
